title: Thanos Gauntlet Totem Pack
description: Replaces The Totem Of Undying With The Gauntlet Thanos Wields
body:
# **Thanos Gauntlet Totem Resource Pack**

Transform your Minecraft experience with this unique resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with the iconic Thanos Gauntlet! When you wield this powerful artifact, you’ll not only look epic but also gain the ability to cheat death in style. Perfect for fans of Marvel and those looking to add a touch of cinematic flair to their adventures.
